offer: For property managers managing 5–15 leases/month, manual tracking of lease dates causes missed renewals. We automate lease management instead of manual tracking of lease dates and reminders.
problem: Managing lease expirations and renewals efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to property managers with demos
Engage in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users test tracking and reminders on 1-3 leases
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear call to action
Produce a demo video of the manual process
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common lease inputs
Allow CSV import for existing leases
